testcase.name: RUB merchant cannot create invoice offline (no rates)
roundUpToOneDecimal 123_41 becomes 123_5
RUB 120 rubles converts correctly with slippage and 1-decimal rounding
INVARIANT - RUB full pipeline maintains consistency
EUR requires FX rates
RUB 76_65 rubles without slippage equals exactly 1 USDC
USD 1 dollar converts to exactly 1_000_000 USDC minor
THB requires FX rates
RUB 76_65 rubles with slippage rounds to 1_1 USDC
1000 RUB must NOT equal 11_14 USDC - original bug test
120 RUB must NOT equal 1 USD - original bug test
roundUpToOneDecimal integer becomes integer with 1 decimal
roundUpToOneDecimal 0_00 stays 0_0
RUB 1000 rubles converts correctly with slippage and 1-decimal rounding
INVARIANT - formatAmountString rejects non-rounded amounts
roundUpToOneDecimal 0_01 becomes 0_1
USD merchant can create invoice offline (no rates)
roundUpToOneDecimal 123_45 becomes 123_5
RUB 100 rubles converts correctly with slippage and 1-decimal rounding
USD merchant can create invoice with rates
INVARIANT - detector expectedAmountMinor equals stored amount
Zero amount returns zero
USD 10 dollars converts to exactly 10_000_000 USDC minor
roundUpToOneDecimal 99_99 becomes 100_0
USD validation passes when rates available
RUB validation fails when rates unavailable
USD does not require FX rates
No currency can create invoice with invalid amount
RUB merchant can create invoice when rates available
USD cents 1050 produces 10_5 USDC (exact)
INVARIANT - URL amount parsed back equals stored minor
roundUpToOneDecimal already 1 decimal stays same
USD cents 12341 produces 123_5 USDC
CEILING 1-decimal rounding - tiny amounts round to 0_1 USDC
EUR validation fails when rates unavailable
USD cents 1041 produces 10_5 USDC (not 10_41)
USD 1 cent converts to exactly 10_000 USDC minor
USD validation passes even when rates unavailable
USD cents 1051 produces 10_6 USDC (rounded up)
roundUpToOneDecimal 123_50 stays 123_5
INVARIANT - USD full pipeline maintains consistency
INVARIANT - usdcMinor must be divisible by 100000 (1 decimal precision)
RUB validation passes when rates available
roundUpToOneDecimal 123_49 becomes 123_5
RUB requires FX rates
roundUpToOneDecimal 123_51 becomes 123_6
USD 99 cents converts to exactly 990_000 USDC minor
